subheadline: Lead with a clear story, one useful detail, and a calm reading rhythm.

items.title: Timeline for polished editorial systems
items.content: Use practical metadata and compact summaries so previews stay easy to compare.

items.title: Timeline for polished editorial systems
items.content: Keep supporting media and copy calm, scannable, and ready to publish.
